---
title: "Chromosome Coverage Comparison"
subtitle: "Design v1 vs v2"
author: "A.G."
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    theme: "cosmo"
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
editor: source
params:
  bed_dir_v1: "/path/to/v1"
  bed_dir_v2: "/path/to/v2"
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| cache: false
#| include: false

library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(plotly)
library(purrr)
library(readr)
library(htmltools)

source(here("R", "functions.R"))

read_design <- function(dir, label) {
  list_bed_files(dir, ".regions.bed.gz") |>
    map(read_bed) |>
    list_rbind() |>
    mutate(design = label)
}

bed <- bind_rows(
  read_design(params$bed_dir_v1, "v1"),
  read_design(params$bed_dir_v2, "v2")
)

chromosomes <- sort(unique(bed$X1))
```

```{r}
#| label: plots
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: "asis"

for (chr in chromosomes) {
  cat(paste0("\n## ", chr, "\n\n"))
  print(tagList(make_chr_comparison_plot(chr, bed)))
  cat("\n\n")
}
```
